_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: Mutation of either of these putative Rbpj binding sites in a 3kb hey1 promoter fragment driving luciferase gene expression resulted in a dramatic reduction in promoter activation by NICD
details: Mutation of either putative Rbpj binding sites in the 3kb hey1 promoter fragment resulted in dramatic reduction in promoter activation by NICD in transfected HEK293 cells
